name: backcourt/wc-mnm-interactivity-api
description: Mix and Match using the Interactivity API

post-autoload-dump: test -f bin/strauss.phar && php bin/strauss.phar include-autoloader || true

scripts-description.makepot-audit: Generate a .pot file for translation. Dry run.
scripts-description.phpcs: Analyze code against the WordPress coding standards with PHP_CodeSniffer
scripts-description.phpcb: Fix coding standards warnings/errors automatically with PHP Code Beautifier
scripts-description.prefix-namespaces: Prefix namespaces of dependencies with the plugin slug
scripts-description.post-install-cmd: Run after composer install to prefix namespaces
scripts-description.post-update-cmd: Run after composer update to prefix namespaces
scripts-description.post-autoload-dump: Run after autoload dump to include the autoloader
